narration: You bought a four-hundred-thousand-dollar home. But add up all thirty years of payments and the bank collects nine hundred fifty-eight thousand from you.
visual: House SVG (triangle roof, rectangle body, windows, door) with '$400K' price tag. Counter animates from $400,000 up to $958,000. 'YOUR $400K HOME ACTUALLY COSTS' springs in from top. Red shock badge '$558K GOES TO INTEREST' pops in at the end.

narration: Every month you pay twenty-six sixty-one. The bank takes twenty-three thirty-three of that as interest. Only three-twenty-eight is actually building your equity.
visual: Light background. Big '$2,661 / MONTH' box in black. Two horizontal progress bars animate in: wide red bar '$2,333 — TO THE BANK', thin green bar '$328 — YOUR EQUITY'. Badge '87% GOES TO THE BANK' springs in.

narration: It stays that way for years. In your first decade, over eighty percent of every payment is pure interest — not equity, not ownership.
visual: Dark background. Stacked bar chart showing 5 columns (YR 1, YR 5, YR 10, YR 20, YR 30). Bars animate upward — early years almost entirely red (interest), later years shift to green (equity). Legend: red = INTEREST, green = YOUR EQUITY. Badge '80%+ INTEREST FOR 7+ YEARS' fades in.

narration: Over thirty years, you hand the bank five hundred fifty-eight thousand in interest alone. That's more than the home itself is worth today.
visual: Light background. Bank building SVG (columns, pediment, dollar sign). Counter animates from $0 to $558,000 in red. Comparison line below: 'vs your home: $400,000' in green. 'BANK KEEPS $558K IN INTEREST' headline.

narration: Make one extra payment a year — that's it. You save eighty-five thousand dollars and own your home four years sooner.
visual: Dark background. Two side-by-side bars animate up: tall red bar 'NORMAL — $558K INTEREST — 30 YRS' and shorter green bar '+1/YEAR — $473K INTEREST — 26 YRS'. Green badge 'SAVES $85,000 + 4 YEARS' springs in.

narration: Biweekly payments, rounded-up amounts, or one extra per year — any of these chips tens of thousands off your total. Follow for one money truth every day.
visual: Light background. Three action cards slide in from left in sequence: checkmark + 'SWITCH TO BIWEEKLY (saves ~$56K)', 'ROUND UP PAYMENTS (even $50/mo helps)', 'ONE EXTRA/YEAR (saves $85K + 4 yrs)'. 'FOLLOW FOR MORE' CTA button springs in at the bottom.
